rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.title: Persona Vectors: Monitoring & Controlling Character (2025/07)
results.note: Persona vectors are ADDITIVE injection at hidden state (scaled coefficient + activation); not a projection matrix M_k with null-space residual suppression. Mechanism differs.

results.title: Steering LLM Interactions Using Persona Vectors
results.note: Additive persona vector injection at hidden state; not projection-and-swap with null-space suppression coefficient β.

results.title: Representation Engineering Survey (2025/03)
results.note: RepE manipulates representations via projection + addition in linear subspaces; overlaps mechanism (projection layer + subspace) though lacks per-persona swappable M_k and explicit β-coefficient null-space residual suppression.

results.title: RepE for LLMs: Survey & Research Challenges (2025/02)
results.note: PCA delta vectors with dot-product projection scoring; scoring tool not runtime persona-overlay projection-and-swap.

results.title: BILLY: Merging Persona Vectors for Creative Gen
results.note: Merges persona vectors; additive composition rather than null-space residual suppression and matrix swap.

results.title: Steer Like the LLM: Activation Steering Mimics Prompting (2026/05)
results.note: Activation steering at hidden state mirroring prompting effect; additive steering, not projection matrix with null-space residual and β suppression.

results.title: ICLR 2026 LLM persona-specialized subnetworks
results.note: Subnetwork IDENTIFICATION via masking calibration; candidate explicitly distinguishes (active runtime projection vs identification only); no projection-and-swap M_k or null-space β.

results.title: Fixed-Persona SLMs with Modular Memory NPC dialogue (2025/11)
results.note: Dynamically SWAPPABLE module at runtime preserving persona identity WITHOUT RETRAINING — directly mirrors candidate's 'mask MATRIX SWAP at runtime without retraining'. Different module type (memory store vs projection matrix) but same swap-at-runtime persona-preservation pattern.

fail_reason: Two results trigger the hit rule by kw>=2: (3) RepE survey overlaps via 'projection' + 'linear subspaces' (≈null-space) matching the projection-layer subspace mechanism, and (8) Fixed-Persona SLMs with Modular Memory directly mirrors 'swappable...at runtime...without retraining' the same persona-preserving runtime swap pattern claimed as novel.
